request.description:
List SES identities available to the tenant's current `aws_ses` configuration.

**Auth:** requires authenticated tenant session/token (`auth:tenant-api`) and `system_configurations.view` permission.

Use this endpoint to power sender/domain pickers in the UI with upstream SES domains and email identities, including domain coverage for exact parent domains only.

Coverage is intentionally conservative:
- `acme.com` covers `user@acme.com`
- `acme.com` does not cover `user@billing.acme.com`
- exact domain match only; subdomain inheritance is not implied

response.name: 200 Email Identities
